perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a sheer black top stands in front of a refrigerated display case at Costco, holding a large circular container of braised food. (2) The camera transitions to close-up shots of the platter, showing segmented portions of braised pork, peanuts, bean curd, and intestines. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting where the first woman is joined by another woman wearing a patterned bucket hat; they use chopsticks to pick up food from the platter, tasting it and gesturing with their hands to describe the flavor.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin over a background of subtle supermarket noise and a faint, muffled BGM. (2) An upbeat, mid-tempo Lo-fi electronic track becomes more prominent as the narration continues. (3) Sounds of chopsticks clicking and soft eating/chewing SFX are heard as two female voices engage in a conversational dialogue about the food's sweetness and texture.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top; '滷水拼盤 好市多新品' (Braised Platter, Costco New Item) appears as a title. (2) Functional Text: '512元' (512 Dollars) and '一公斤618元' (618 Dollars per kg) appear to show pricing. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: '跟花生融合的很好', '非常的甜', and '油潑辣子' appear in colorful, variety-show style fonts to emphasize flavor descriptions.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail store -> Close-up product display -> Home-based tasting and review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 male shopper partially visible in the background at Costco
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with a black beret and black sheer top; another woman with a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a brightly lit Costco warehouse with stainless steel shelves; second scene is a modern home interior with a dining table and warm lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Price/Value Detail -> Taste Review
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a new Costco food item by showcasing its appearance, price, and detailed flavor profile to provide a purchase recommendation for viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of the product, price information, and positive review of taste components.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of variety-show style large text overlays and a mix of store footage and home tasting.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets a consumer audience looking for cost-effective food options at bulk retailers, using a relatable 'best friend' vlog style.
